name: feature-flow
description: Bundle of 10 skills closing the loop discover → problem → plan → implement+review → API docs → test plan → auto-test → stakeholder brief → deep-understanding handoff, with a Claude⇄Codex peer-debate trio at the front: ff-discover (front-door when the problem isn't yet stated — interview + vocabulary ladder + blindspot pass into a vivid HTML discovery brief that sharpens the problem and maps unknowns without deciding), ff-impl-status (live HTML status tracker), ff-api-contract-writer (caller-facing Markdown API contracts), ff-test-case-writer (interactive HTML test plans), ff-service-test-runner (test plan → pytest → per-TC results), ff-feature-brief (non-technical one-pager for PO/QC), ff-comprehension-coach (interactive teach-until-understood with checklist + quizzes), ff-problem-solver (Claude & Codex debate a hard problem via /codex-think-about, then commit to a final decision), ff-planning (Claude & Codex deep-dive code and debate via /codex-think-about into an implementation plan, then adversarially review it via /codex-plan-review), ff-implement (Claude implements the plan, then Claude & Codex review the code via /codex-impl-review for quality and plan-adherence).
